response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience and entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-agent tooling and infrastructure work, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level IC role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform
Broad technical fluency across languages and systems
concerns: No clear AI/ML product or platform ownership demonstrated
Unclear if 15 years of relevant engineering experience is met
Lacks documented cloud strategy or customer advisory impact
